components.name: SLA Visibility
components.description: Summary-card SLA block: eyebrow label + ⓘ tooltip, elapsed counter (bold dark) + ' / 30m SLA' (grey), optional trailing SLA badge (On-Time/At Risk/Delayed/Prev: duration).

components.name: Order Detail Accordions
sourceFiles: LETA Playground — Order Management / Order Management Components (852:159917)
components.description: Real, reusable local Figma component (not an ad-hoc reconstruction) for every collapsible section in the View Order drawer body: Variant=Pickup From / Pickup From + Proof of Pickup / Deliver To / Proof of Delivery / Items / Payment Info / More Info (Pre-Dispatch / Post Assignment / Post Completion) × Size=Open/Closed × State=Idle/Hover. Structure: a Content Primitives (Section Heading) header — title + chevron toggle in Trailing Content's Interactive Elements slot — over a List Group of Content Primitives (Vertical List Row) fields, in a bordered/rounded card (fill --surface-neutral-bg-default, border --border-neutral-default, radius --rounding-xl/12, pad 20, header→body gap 12, field-row gap 20). Implemented in code as the local `Section`/`Field`/`FieldRows` helpers in apps/playground/src/components/orderDetail/OrderDetailDrawer.tsx — verified structurally matching this component (padding/radius/gaps/tokens all line up); kept as local composition rather than promoted to @leta/components because it is Playground-specific drawer chrome, not a general-purpose DS molecule.

components.name: Order Overview Card
sourceFiles: LETA Playground — Order Management / Order Management Components (852:159917)
components.description: Real, reusable local Figma component — the summary card at the top of the View Order drawer body (736×168, HORIZONTAL, 50/50). Left half = Order Mini Map View (368×168, a map render + route vectors + Map Icon pins + a Secondary/Small Icon-Only Expand button top-right). Right half = Order Status Summary (368×168, pad [16,20,16,20], gap 20, justify center): a Metrics Section holding the SLA Visibility block (eyebrow + ⓘ + elapsed counter + ' / 30m SLA' + trailing SLA badge), a horizontal Demarcator, and a Content Primitives (Utility) row (summary main/sub copy + a Secondary CTA). One variant per lifecycle state (e.g. 'Assigned Order Overview'). Implemented in OrderDetailDrawer.tsx (hand-composed summary card, map via OrderDetailMap/MapView) — padding/gaps verified matching (16/20, gap 20, 50/50 split). The 'SLA Visibility' entry below is the nested sub-region of this card.

components.name: Picup Code Banner
sourceFiles: LETA Playground — Order Management / Order Management Components / Miscellaneous order view components (1454:207950)
components.description: Real, reusable local Figma component (not an ad-hoc reconstruction) — supersedes the prior 'Pickup Code digits' ad-hoc entry (stale nodeId 271:36357, from the original Overview wireframe before the designer componentized it). Lavender --surface-secondary-bg-raised card, radius --rounding-lg, pad 16px 20px; dark-navy --surface-secondary-bg digit boxes (radius --rounding-md) with white --text-on-color-label text; title in --text-secondary-label; Plain Copy-Outline button. Implemented in OrderDetailDrawer.tsx (the pickup-code banner block, rebuilt to match this component 2026-07-21 per the 13-screen reconciliation pass).

components.name: Proof image row (Base Card)
components.description: Image-thumb + filename ('Image.png') + Secondary View button; used for Proof of Pickup / Proof of Delivery / Recipient Signature rows.

components.name: Map Card
sourceFiles: LETA Playground — Order Management / Order Management Components / Miscellaneous order view components (1454:207950)
components.description: Real, reusable local Figma component (not an ad-hoc reconstruction) — supersedes the prior 'Expanded-map info card' ad-hoc entry (stale nodeId 1419:462091, from the original Overview wireframe before the designer componentized it). Property 1=Pickup / Property 1=Drop-off variants: white floating card affixed to a map pin — leading icon tile + name + truncated address. Implemented in OrderDetailMap.tsx's expanded-map info cards affixed to the depot/drop-off pins.
